faq.sectionSubtitle: Learn more about Saldopedia services. Our support team is ready 24/7.
faq.noResultsCta: . Try different keywords or contact our customer service.
faq.q1: How do I start a transaction?
faq.a1: Very easy! Fill out the order form, choose the currency to buy/sell (Crypto, PayPal, or Skrill), then follow payment instructions. Transactions processed in 5-15 minutes. Starting from Rp 25,000.
faq.q2: What are the min and max transaction amounts?
faq.a2: Minimum transaction is Rp 25,000 for all services. For maximum, contact customer service for details.
faq.a3: Transactions are processed in 5-15 minutes after payment confirmation. Large amounts may need extra time for verification.
faq.a4: Absolutely! Saldopedia uses SSL 256-bit encryption, automatic verification, and 100% data protection. We've served thousands of transactions with high satisfaction.
faq.a5: Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), USDT, BNB, Solana, MATIC, and other popular cryptocurrencies. See full list on Crypto List page.
faq.q6: How do I make a payment?
faq.a6: Transfer to the account provided after creating order. Make sure to transfer the exact amount for faster processing.
faq.q7: Can I trade PayPal and Skrill?
faq.a7: Yes! Besides crypto, we also offer PayPal and Skrill trading with competitive rates. Fast processing for small or large amounts.
faq.q8: How do I check the latest rates?
faq.a8: Rates are always updated following real-time market prices. Check the Rates page or use the Calculator on website.
faq.a9: No hidden fees! The displayed rate is final. What you see is what you pay.
faq.q10: How do I contact customer service?
faq.a10: Contact WhatsApp 08119666620. Our team is ready to help with fast and friendly response!
faq.a11: No complicated registration needed! Just fill the order form or contact WhatsApp to transact. Simple and fast process.
faq.q12: What if my transfer is confirmed late?
faq.a12: Payments are detected automatically. If issues persist after 30 minutes, contact WhatsApp with transfer proof.
faq.q13: Can I transact outside business hours?
faq.a13: Yes! Orders can be sent 24/7. Customer service is active 09:00-21:00 WIB, but orders are still processed automatically anytime.
faq.q14: How do I cancel a transaction?
faq.a14: Before paying, just ignore the order. If already paid, contact WhatsApp 08119666620 immediately.
faq.a15: Data security is our priority. All information is kept confidential with encryption for maximum protection.

whatIs.title: What are Cookies?
whatIs.content: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when visiting a website. Cookies help websites remember your preferences like language and settings, making your next visit easier.

howWeUse.title: How Does Saldopedia Use Cookies?
howWeUse.content: We use cookies to enhance your experience, understand visitor interactions, and provide relevant content. You have full control over which cookies are accepted.

necessary.title: 1. Necessary Cookies
necessary.description: Essential cookies for basic website operation that cannot be disabled. Usually only set in response to your actions.

preference.title: 2. Preference Cookies
preference.description: Preference cookies allow website to remember information that changes appearance or behavior.

analytics.title: 3. Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: Analytics cookies help us understand visitor interactions by collecting anonymous information to improve website.

marketing.title: 4. Marketing Cookies
marketing.description: Marketing cookies track visitors and display relevant ads.

thirdParty.title: Third-Party Cookies
thirdParty.description: Some cookies are set by third-party services. We don't control these cookies. For more info, visit:

control.title: How to Control Cookies
control.intro: You have several ways to control cookies:

banner.title: Through Cookie Banner
banner.description: When first visiting, you'll see a cookie banner to accept or reject categories. Change preferences anytime through the cookie settings icon.

browser.title: Through Browser
browser.description: Web browsers allow cookie control through settings. For more info:

control.noteContent: Disabling certain cookies may affect website functionality. Necessary cookies cannot be disabled.

duration.title: How Long Are Cookies Stored?
duration.sessionDesc: Temporary cookies deleted when closing browser
duration.persistentDesc: Cookies that remain until deleted or expired (1-24 months)

updates.title: Cookie Policy Updates
updates.content: We may update this policy to reflect cookie changes. Significant changes will be announced on website.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: If you have questions about cookie use, contact us:

cookiePolicy.footer: By continuing to use the website, you consent to cookie use according to this policy.

notice.title: Important:
notice.content: By using Saldopedia services, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to all of these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our services.

termsOfService.footer: © 2025 Saldopedia. All rights reserved under applicable law.

section1.title: 1. Introduction
section1.p1: Welcome to Saldopedia. This document constitutes a legally binding agreement between you as a user and Saldopedia as a provider of cryptocurrency, PayPal, and Skrill trading services.
section1.p2: By accessing or using our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. Our services are available for digital transactions starting from Rp 25,000 with fast processing of 5-15 minutes.

section2.title: 2. Definitions
section2.intro: In these Terms and Conditions, the following terms have the following meanings:
section2.weDesc: refers to the cryptocurrency, PayPal, and Skrill trading service platform operated by Saldopedia.
section2.userDesc: refers to individuals or entities using Saldopedia services.
section2.serviceDesc: refers to all products, features, and facilities provided by Saldopedia including cryptocurrency trading, PayPal top-up, and Skrill transactions.
section2.cryptoDesc: refers to digital assets including but not limited to Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), USDT, BNB, Solana, and other cryptocurrencies supported by the platform.
section2.botDesc: refers to the online order form and automated system for processing transactions on the Saldopedia platform.

sub1.title: 3.1 User Eligibility
sub1.intro: To use Saldopedia services, you must meet the following criteria:
sub1.age: Be at least 18 years old or of legal adult age according to the laws applicable in your jurisdiction
sub1.info: Provide accurate, complete, and current information when conducting transactions
sub1.legal: Not use the service for illegal activities, money laundering, or terrorism financing
sub1.payment: Have a valid Indonesian bank account or legitimate payment method
sub1.telegram: Have active email or WhatsApp access for communication and transaction confirmation

sub2.title: 3.2 Registration and Account
sub2.content: Saldopedia provides optional account registration for a better transaction experience. You can create an account through our website to access transaction history, dashboard, and other features. By registering, you agree to maintain the confidentiality of your account credentials.

sub3.title: 3.3 Account Security
sub3.intro: You are fully responsible for maintaining the security of your account by:
sub3.secure: Using a strong and unique password for your Saldopedia account
sub3.confidential: Keeping login information confidential and not sharing it with anyone
sub3.noShare: Not providing account access to third parties without our knowledge
sub3.report: Immediately reporting to us if suspicious activity or unauthorized access to your account occurs

sub1.title: 4.1 Transaction Process
sub1.intro: Every transaction at Saldopedia follows standard procedures as follows:
sub1.step1: Fill out the order form on the website or contact customer service via WhatsApp
sub1.step2: Select service type: Cryptocurrency, PayPal, or Skrill
sub1.step3: Enter the required amount and transaction details
sub1.step4: System displays real-time rate and total payment
sub1.step5: Make payment according to the provided instructions
sub1.step6: Confirm payment and wait for verification (5-15 minutes)
sub1.step7: Receive cryptocurrency or balance in your designated account

sub2.title: 4.2 Transaction Limits
sub2.minValue: Rp 25,000 for all service types (Crypto, PayPal, Skrill)
sub2.maxValue: Varies depending on service. Contact customer service for large transactions.
sub2.note: Transaction limits may change at any time according to policy and liquidity availability.

sub3.title: 4.3 Payment Methods
sub3.content: We accept payments via bank transfer to the account provided at order time (BCA, Mandiri, BRI, BNI, and other banks). Ensure the transfer matches the exact amount shown to expedite the verification process.

sub4.title: 4.4 Rates and Fees
sub4.realtime: Cryptocurrency rates follow global market prices in real-time with a 5% spread
sub4.inclusive: Displayed rates already include all service fees
sub4.noHidden: No hidden fees or additional charges beyond the displayed rate
sub4.variable: Rates may change following market fluctuations before order confirmation
sub4.applies: The applicable rate is the rate when the order is confirmed and payment is received

sub5.title: 4.5 Confirmation and Processing
sub5.content: Payments will be verified automatically. Transaction processing takes 5-15 minutes after payment confirmation. If the transaction has not been processed after 30 minutes, please contact customer service with proof of payment.

sub1.title: 5.1 Cancellation Before Payment
sub1.content: You may cancel an order at any time before making payment by ignoring the order or contacting customer service. There is no penalty or fee for cancellation before payment.

sub2.title: 5.2 Cancellation After Payment
sub2.intro: After payment is made, the transaction essentially
sub2.conditions: due to the irreversible nature of cryptocurrency transactions. However, refunds may be considered under the following conditions:
sub2.systemError: A system error occurs that causes the transaction to fail to process
sub2.overpay: The user made an overpayment beyond the specified amount
sub2.notReceived: Cryptocurrency or balance is not sent within 24 hours without explanation
sub2.refund: Refunds will be processed within 1-3 business days to the same account as the original payment.

sub3.title: 5.3 User Errors
sub3.intro: Saldopedia is not responsible for losses caused by user errors, including but not limited to:
sub3.wrongAddress: Entering an incorrect or invalid cryptocurrency wallet address
sub3.wrongAmount: Transferring an amount different from payment instructions
sub3.wrongBank: Transfer to the wrong account or not to an official Saldopedia account
sub3.lostAccess: Losing access to the destination wallet or PayPal/Skrill account

sub1.title: 6.1 Cryptocurrency Risks
sub1.content: You understand and accept that cryptocurrency is a highly volatile asset. Value can fluctuate significantly in a short time. Saldopedia does not provide investment advice and is not responsible for losses resulting from cryptocurrency market value changes.

sub2.title: 6.2 Limitation of Liability
sub2.intro: Saldopedia is not responsible for losses arising from:
sub2.downtime: Service disruption due to scheduled or unscheduled maintenance
sub2.internet: User internet connection or device problems
sub2.blockchain: Blockchain confirmation delays or network congestion
sub2.delay: Processing delays caused by third parties (banks, payment gateways)
sub2.footer: Saldopedia's maximum liability is limited to the value of the transaction in question.

sub3.title: 6.3 Force Majeure
sub3.content: Saldopedia is not responsible for failure or delay in fulfilling obligations caused by circumstances beyond our control, including natural disasters, war, government actions, pandemics, or global technology infrastructure disruptions.

sub1.title: 7.1 Saldopedia Rights
sub1.verify: Request additional identity verification for certain transactions in accordance with AML/KYC regulations
sub1.reject: Refuse or cancel transactions suspected of violating terms or law
sub1.report: Report suspicious activities to the relevant authorities
sub1.close: Suspend or terminate service access for users who violate the terms

sub2.title: 7.2 Prohibited Activities
sub2.intro: Users are strictly prohibited from using Saldopedia services for:
sub2.fraud: Fraud, phishing, or other deceptive activities
sub2.laundering: Money laundering or terrorism financing activities
sub2.manipulation: Market manipulation or unethical trading practices
sub2.spam: Sending spam or abusing communication systems
sub2.ip: Violation of third-party intellectual property rights
sub2.illegal: Other illegal activities under Indonesian or international law

sub1.title: 8.1 Data Collected
sub1.intro: Saldopedia collects and processes user data for transaction and security purposes, including:
sub1.payment: Bank account details and payment methods
sub1.contact: Contact information such as email and WhatsApp number

sub2.title: 8.2 Data Usage
sub2.law: Comply with applicable legal and regulatory obligations

section9.title: 9. Intellectual Property Rights
section9.content: All content, logos, trademarks, and other materials on the Saldopedia platform are protected by copyright and intellectual property rights. It is strictly prohibited to copy, reproduce, distribute, or use such materials without written permission from Saldopedia.

section10.title: 10. Changes to Terms and Conditions
section10.p1: Saldopedia reserves the right to change these Terms and Conditions at any time. Changes will take effect after publication on our website.
section10.p2: Use of Saldopedia services after changes are published constitutes your agreement to the new terms and conditions.

section11.title: 11. Termination of Service
section11.intro: Saldopedia may suspend or terminate your access to our services if:
section11.violate: You violate these Terms and Conditions
section11.false: You provide false or misleading information
section11.suspect: There is suspicion of illegal activity or fraud
section11.authority: Required by legal or regulatory authorities

section12.title: 12. Governing Law
section12.content: These Terms and Conditions are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Indonesia. Any disputes arising shall be resolved through deliberation first, and if no agreement is reached, shall be resolved through the competent courts in Indonesia.

section13.title: 13. Contact Us
section13.intro: If you have questions or need assistance regarding these Terms and Conditions, please contact us:
section13.hoursValue: 09:00 - 21:00 WIB (Customer Service), Orders can be placed 24/7

section14.title: 14. Closing Provisions
section14.content: If any provision in these Terms and Conditions is declared invalid or unenforceable, the other provisions remain in full effect. Saldopedia's failure to enforce any right or provision in this agreement does not constitute a waiver of that right.

commitment.title: Our Commitment
commitment.content: Saldopedia is fully committed to protecting the privacy and security of your personal data. We handle your information with full responsibility and transparency.

privacyPolicy.footer: By using Saldopedia services, you agree to the practices described in this Privacy Policy.

section1.title: 1. Introduction
section1.p1: This Privacy Policy explains how Saldopedia collects, uses, stores, and protects your personal information when you use our platform for cryptocurrency, PayPal, and Skrill transactions.
section1.p2: By accessing or using Saldopedia services, you consent to the collection and use of information in accordance with this policy. If you do not agree to this policy, please do not use our services.

sub1.title: 2.1 Information You Provide
sub1.intro: We collect information you provide directly, including:
sub1.contactDesc: Full name, email address, WhatsApp number, and other identification information.
sub1.paymentDesc: Cryptocurrency wallet addresses, PayPal account, Skrill account, and bank account details.
sub1.transactionDesc: Purchase and sale history, transaction amounts, and payment methods used.
sub1.communicationDesc: Messages you send via WhatsApp, email, or contact forms on the website.
sub1.newsletterDesc: Email address if you subscribe to our newsletter to receive promotions and latest updates.

sub2.title: 2.2 Automatically Collected Information
sub2.intro: When you use our services, we automatically collect:
sub2.deviceDesc: Device type, operating system, browser, and language settings.
sub2.usageDesc: Pages visited, access times, visit duration, and navigation patterns.
sub2.ipDesc: IP address for security, fraud prevention, and geographic analysis.
sub2.cookieDesc: Cookies, pixels, and similar technologies to enhance user experience.
sub2.telegramDesc: Information from WhatsApp interactions for customer service and order processing.

sub3.title: 2.3 Information from Third Parties
sub3.intro: We may receive information from third-party sources, such as:
sub3.provider: Payment service providers and cryptocurrency payment gateways
sub3.blockchain: Public data from blockchain networks for transaction verification
sub3.social: Social media platforms if you contact us through those channels

section3.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
section3.intro: We use collected information for various purposes:

sub1.title: 3.1 Transaction Processing
sub1.process: Process cryptocurrency, PayPal, and Skrill purchases and sales
sub1.notify: Send transaction notifications and confirmations via email and WhatsApp
sub1.support: Provide customer support and resolve transaction issues
sub1.manage: Manage user accounts and your preferences

sub2.title: 3.2 Security and Compliance
sub2.detect: Detect and prevent fraudulent or abusive activities
sub2.verify: Verify user identity in accordance with KYC (Know Your Customer) regulations
sub2.protect: Protect the rights, property, and safety of Saldopedia and users
sub2.comply: Comply with legal obligations and regulations applicable in Indonesia

sub3.title: 3.3 Service Improvement
sub3.analyze: Analyze usage patterns to improve user experience
sub3.develop: Develop new features and services based on user needs
sub3.research: Conduct research and analysis for platform optimization
sub3.measure: Measure effectiveness of services and marketing campaigns

sub4.title: 3.4 Communications
sub4.send: Send important information about services and policy changes
sub4.update: Provide updates about rates, promotions, and special offers
sub4.survey: Send customer satisfaction surveys to improve services
sub4.respond: Respond to your questions, complaints, and requests

section4.title: 4. Legal Basis for Data Processing
section4.intro: We process your personal data based on the following legal grounds:
section4.consentDesc: You have given consent for the processing of personal data for specific purposes.
section4.contractDesc: Processing is necessary to fulfill a contract or transaction you requested.
section4.legalDesc: Processing is necessary to comply with applicable legal obligations.
section4.interestDesc: Processing is necessary for our legitimate interests, such as fraud prevention and platform security.

section5.title: 5. Information Sharing and Disclosure
section5.intro: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information. However, we may share information in the following situations:

sub1.title: 5.1 Third-Party Service Providers
sub1.intro: We work with trusted third parties for:
sub1.payment: Payment processing and cryptocurrency gateways (NOWPayments, etc.)
sub1.cloud: Secure hosting and cloud storage services
sub1.analytics: Website analytics and user experience improvement
sub1.footer: All service providers are bound by confidentiality agreements and may only use data according to our instructions.

sub2.title: 5.2 Legal Obligations
sub2.intro: We may disclose information if required by law or to:
sub2.court: Respond to court orders, subpoenas, or other legal processes
sub2.law: Cooperate with law enforcement authorities in investigations
sub2.aml: Comply with anti-money laundering (AML) and terrorism financing regulations
sub2.protect: Protect the rights, safety, and property of Saldopedia and users

sub3.title: 5.3 Business Transactions
sub3.content: If Saldopedia is involved in a merger, acquisition, or asset sale, user information may be transferred as part of the transaction. We will notify you before your information becomes subject to a different privacy policy.

sub4.title: 5.4 Public Blockchain Data
sub4.content: Cryptocurrency transactions are recorded on public blockchains. Wallet addresses and transaction details can be publicly viewed on blockchain networks. Saldopedia is not responsible for the visibility of this data.

sub1.title: 6.1 Technical Security Measures
sub1.intro: We implement comprehensive security measures to protect your data:
sub1.encryptionDesc: All data transmissions are encrypted using SSL/TLS protocols.
sub1.accessDesc: Access to personal data is restricted only to authorized personnel.
sub1.firewallDesc: Infrastructure is protected with advanced firewalls and attack protection.
sub1.monitoringDesc: Security systems are monitored in real-time to detect suspicious activity.
sub1.auditDesc: Routine security evaluations and testing to identify vulnerabilities.

sub2.title: 6.2 Data Breaches
sub2.p1: Although we implement the best security measures, no system is 100% secure. If a data breach affecting your personal information occurs, we will notify you and relevant authorities in accordance with applicable law.
sub2.p2: You are also responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials. Never share your password or login information with anyone.

sub1.title: 7.1 Retention Period
sub1.content: We retain your personal data for as long as necessary to provide services and fulfill legal obligations. Retention periods may vary depending on the type of data and purpose of processing.

sub2.title: 7.2 Retention Criteria
sub2.intro: Retention periods are determined based on:
sub2.transactionDesc: Retained for a minimum of 5 years in accordance with tax and anti-money laundering regulations.
sub2.accountDesc: Retained while your account is active and up to 2 years after account closure.
sub2.marketingDesc: Retained until you unsubscribe or request deletion.
sub2.legalDesc: Certain data may be retained longer if required by law.

sub3.title: 7.3 Data Deletion
sub3.content: After the retention period expires, your data will be securely deleted or anonymized so it cannot be linked to you. Anonymized data may be used for statistical analysis.

section8.title: 8. Your Rights
section8.intro: In accordance with applicable data protection laws, you have the following rights:

sub1.title: 8.1 Right of Access
sub1.content: You have the right to request a copy of the personal data we hold about you. We will provide this information in a readable format within 30 business days.

sub2.title: 8.2 Right to Rectification
sub2.content: You have the right to request correction of inaccurate or incomplete personal data. You can update your account information directly through your dashboard or by contacting us.

sub3.title: 8.3 Right to Erasure
sub3.content: You have the right to request deletion of your personal data, except where we are required to retain it due to legal obligations or to complete ongoing transactions.

sub4.title: 8.4 Right to Restriction of Processing
sub4.content: You have the right to request restriction of processing of your personal data in certain situations, such as when you question the accuracy of the data.

sub5.title: 8.5 Right to Data Portability
sub5.content: You have the right to receive your personal data in a structured, machine-readable format and to transfer it to another service provider.

sub6.title: 8.6 Right to Object
sub6.content: You have the right to object to the processing of your personal data for direct marketing purposes or processing based on our legitimate interests.

sub7.title: 8.7 Right to Withdraw Consent
sub7.content: If processing is based on consent, you have the right to withdraw that consent at any time. Withdrawal of consent does not affect the lawfulness of prior processing.

sub8.title: 8.8 How to Exercise Your Rights
sub8.intro: To exercise the above rights, please contact us through:
sub8.footer: We will respond to your request within 30 business days. Identity verification may be required before processing your request.

section9.title: 9. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
section9.intro: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience. For complete information, please read our

sub1.title: 9.1 Types of Cookies Used
sub1.necessaryDesc: Required for basic website functions such as security and navigation.
sub1.preferenceDesc: Store your choices such as language and display theme.
sub1.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how visitors interact with the website.
sub1.marketingDesc: Used to display relevant ads based on your interests.

sub2.title: 9.2 Managing Cookies
sub2.content: You can manage cookie preferences through the cookie banner on the website or your browser settings. Disabling certain cookies may affect website functionality.

section10.title: 10. Children's Privacy
section10.content: Saldopedia services are not intended for children under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children. If you become aware that a child has provided personal data to us, please contact us for data deletion.

section11.title: 11. International Data Transfers
section11.p1: Your data may be transferred to and stored on servers located outside Indonesia for processing and storage purposes.
section11.p2: We ensure that international data transfers are conducted in accordance with adequate data protection standards through contractual agreements with service providers.
section11.p3: By using our services, you consent to data transfers outside Indonesian territory for the purposes described in this policy.

section12.title: 12. Third-Party Website Links
section12.p1: Our website may contain links to third-party sites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of those sites.
section12.p2: We recommend that you read the privacy policy of each site you visit. This privacy policy only applies to information collected by Saldopedia.

section13.title: 13. Privacy Policy Changes
section13.p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or legal obligations.
section13.p2: Significant changes will be announced through website notifications or email. The "Last updated" date at the top indicates when this policy was last revised.
section13.p3: Continued use of our services after changes means you accept the updated policy. If you do not agree with the changes, please discontinue use of our services.

section14.title: 14. Contact Us
section14.intro: If you have questions, comments, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact us through:
